evidence.text:
Examples and guides for using the OpenAI API

> ✨ Navigate at [cookbook.openai.com](https://cookbook.openai.com) Example code and guides for accomplishing common tasks with the [OpenAI API](https://platform.openai.com/docs/introduction). To run these examples, you'll need an OpenAI account and associated API key ([create a free account here](https://platform.
